digital payment solutions, including contactless options. Benefit from rewards, prepaid cards, and alternative payment methods.

div.p: Accepted Across Africa and Beyond. Over 100 million Verve Cards Issued

header.h2: Connecting Africa with Rewarding Value Exchange
header.h3: Verve is Africa's most successful card brand with payment tokens and card option that power commerce across Africa,empowering Africans to live the good life, both at home and beyond.

div.p: Shop, pay bills and travel with ease. You've got Verve.
Delight your customers with rewarding payments
Issue and accept Africa's favourite card brand.
Enable transparency and accountability with Verve.

div.p: Leveraging a firm understanding of the African terrain, Verve emerged to take up the challlenge of ensuring all segments of the African market are included and sufficiently connected to the possibilities offered by card payments.
We introduced a more affordable card scheme option, secured with chip + PIN technology and compatible with the customer's reality.
Over a decade later, with a wide issuance and acceptance footprint within and beyond the continent, Verve is still leading the way with payment solutions built for Africa, by Africans.

div.h2: 100 million Reasons Why Africans Trust the Verve Card
div.p: One hundred million isn’t just a number; it’s a heartbeat. It’s the rhythm of daily life, quietly carried in online wallets, handbags, and pockets across the continent. It echoes in early-morning rushes and late-night transactions, in hurried taps and careful card inserts, and in that familiar sigh of relief when a payment goes through. For Verve, issuing over 100 million cards is not simply a milestone. It is a powerful story of presence, trust, and the everyday lives of more than 100 million people.

div.h2: 100 million Reasons Why Africans Trust the Verve Card
div.p: One hundred million isn’t just a number; it’s a heartbeat. It’s the rhythm of daily life, quietly carried in online wallets, handbags, and pockets across the continent. It echoes in early-morning rushes and late-night transactions, in hurried taps and careful card inserts, and in that familiar sigh of relief when a payment goes through. For Verve, issuing over 100 million cards is not simply a milestone. It is a powerful story of presence, trust, and the everyday lives of more than 100 million people.

div.h2: How to Shop Seamlessly on Global Platforms with Verve
div.p: The world is closer than it has ever been. Today, you can sit in Lagos, Abuja, or Port Harcourt and shop from platforms thousands of kilometres away. From fashion and gadgets to household essentials and digital services, global marketplaces are now part of everyday Nigerian life. What used to feel distant now feels normal. What used to require workarounds now feels expected. And at the centre of this shift is the ability to pay seamlessly, without friction or second-guessing.

div.h2: From “Transfer?” to “Tap & Go”: The Evolution of Payment in Nigeria
div.p: Not long ago, every transaction in Nigeria ended with the same hopeful question: “Transfer?” It echoed through market stalls, salons, restaurants, offices, and online stores, emerging after agreements were made but before trust was fully formed. It signified a moment of anticipation; pulling out a phone, waiting for network bars, refreshing apps, double-checking account numbers, and holding one’s breath until alerts arrived. It transcended mere payment; it became a ritual of caution, patience, and hope.

By ensuring that Africans can access and exchange value within and beyond the continent, we lay the rails for Africa to emerge, prosper and thrive. From Kano to Kigali, Abidjan to Abuja, Lagos to Lome; Verve connects Africans to the good life via payment cards and tokens built by Africans, for Africans.

Businesses drive economies, and Verve drives businesses with versatile physical and digital payment options designed to aid growth. From customized danglers and signage to seamless POS, digital, and card payments, Verve enhances your visibility and profitability.

Whatever the good life means to you, Verve enables you to reach for it. By guaranteeing easy access to your money wherever you are, Verve makes it easy for you to make the choices that drive your aspirations and power the life of your dreams.

We believe payments should be rewarding, so we ensure everyone on the Verve network enjoys rewards. From affordable acquiring fees to unbeatable acceptance offers and promotions for the end users, it's always rewarding to choose Verve.

Verve Access is our exclusive portal for Verve partners. Verve Access members are always first to know about new developments within the scheme, they enjoy easy monitoring of their transactions and unhindered access to Scheme benefits.

Because we understand that growth never stops, we are investing in grooming and equipping the next generation of Africans to innovate for Africa. Verve academy is committed to raising a crop of world-class payment professionals focused on Africa.

div.h1: Live Your Best Life with VerveLife
div.p: Verve is on a mission to promote fitness and healthy living by organizing pop-up fitness parties in collaboration with fitness instructors and gyms nationwide.
© 2026 Verve
